resources.string: Please, introduce a valid email address.
Passwords must have at least 8 characters consisting of lowercase and uppercase letters, and numbers.

string.name: access_form
string.comment: Shown as an action button in an authorization card to access the sign up form.

string.name: select
string.comment: Shown on list items that are not selected, to indicate that it can be tapped to be selected.

string.name: selected
string.comment: Shown on list items that are currently selected. Tapping the item again does nothing.

string.name: disabled
string.comment: Shown as description on elements that are disabled.

string.name: window_minimize
string.comment: Content description of the button for minimizing the window

string.name: window_maximize
string.comment: Content description of the button for maximizing the window

string.name: window_close
string.comment: Content description of the button for closing the window

resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Tap here to register
Already have an account? Tap here to login
Please check your email for a confirmation link.
You are not authorized to use the lending system. Please, click the button below to complete the sign up form.

string.name: lending_category
string.comment: Tooltip shown on the category indicator.

string.name: lending_category_edit
string.comment: Tooltip shown on the category indicator when the user is an administrator, and can change the category.

resources.string: Please, verify your personal information below, and read carefully all the information provided.
This should match the name displayed in your identification card (DNI, NIE...)
Please, make sure all the information above is correct, otherwise leave this form and modify it.
Please, mark the sports you practise more often.
To be able to use the lending system, you must have an insurance. Please, select the type below.
Select the sections you usually do activities with.
I certify that I know the specific internal rules of the mountaineering and climbing sections that enable the free use of equipment property of the CEA.
I certify that I have the required skills and knowledge to use the material lent.
I know that I am the first and only responsible of the damages that might occur to the people using the equipment, and the equipment itself.
I know that at the end of the activity I have to complete a memory with the results of the activity.
